SELECT reservoir_quantile(value, 0.75, 8192) FROM (SELECT value FROM data_table WHERE value > 5);
SELECT reservoir_quantile(sub_query.value, 0.6, 1024) FROM (SELECT value FROM data_table WHERE value BETWEEN 3 AND 7) AS sub_query;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT reservoir_quantile(data_table.value, 0.5), AVG(additional_data.value) FROM data_table JOIN additional_data ON data_table.value < additional_data.value GROUP BY additional_data.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT reservoir_quantile(value, 0.1, 8192) AS quantile FROM data_table GROUP BY value HAVING quantile IS NOT NULL) AS temp;
SELECT reservoir_quantile(value, 0.01) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM data_table) AS distinct_values;
SELECT reservoir_quantile(value, 0.9, 8192) FROM (SELECT value FROM data_table ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 100) AS limited_values;
